title: isachne nilagirica
intro: Isachne nilagirica, also known as Nilgiri grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Isachne nilagirica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Isachne nilagirica can be made into decoctions, infusions, or poultices to utilize its medicinal properties.
